name: UniFi
description: Ubiquiti UniFi network management platform. Monitors hosts, sites, devices, firewall policies, and ISP connectivity through the official UniFi Site Manager and Network APIs.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Sign in to the UniFi Site Manager at https://unifi.ui.com
2. Go to the API section (or Settings > API Keys in EA)
3. Click 'Create New API Key' and copy it
4. For firewall checks: note your Console ID from the hosts list and Site ID from the sites list
5. Paste the API key and optional IDs below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Sign in to unifi.ui.com, navigate to API section, and create a new API key.

credentialFields.label: Console ID (Host ID)
credentialFields.helpText: The ID of the UniFi console/host for firewall checks. Find it via the Site Manager API (GET /v1/hosts) or from the UniFi Site Manager URL.

credentialFields.label: Site ID
credentialFields.helpText: The ID of the site for firewall checks. Find it via the Site Manager API (GET /v1/sites) or from the UniFi Site Manager URL.

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies that the UniFi Site Manager API is reachable and the API key is valid by listing hosts.

checks.name: Device List
checks.description: Retrieves all UniFi devices managed by the account and verifies each device is online and adopted.

checks.name: Production Firewall
checks.description: Checks that firewall policies are configured on the specified UniFi site via the Network API Cloud Connector.

checks.name: TLS/HTTPS
checks.description: Verifies that UniFi hosts are running with secure HTTPS connections by checking host reported state.

checks.name: Monitoring and Alerting
checks.description: Verifies that ISP monitoring is active by checking that ISP metrics data exists for the account's sites.
